ops.text: The code-stewardship capt-hook fires on Workflow relaunches after transient API errors (529 Overloaded, 0 tokens, tree untouched), reading the retry as "dismissing a pre-existing issue." A server-side overload leaves nothing in the codebase to fix; the guard should exempt pure-transport failure/retry shapes (agents_error with zero tool_uses) from the stewardship pattern.
